extension.description: Live attention router for developers juggling many Claude Code sessions across projects: see which one needs you now (working / your turn / blocked / idle), browse history, resume, and scaffold new projects. Read-only over Claude Code transcripts.
view.sessions.name: Sessions
command.addProject.title: Add project
command.open.title: Open topic
command.refresh.title: Refresh
command.resume.title: Resume in terminal
command.resumeFull.title: Resume with full permissions
command.archive.title: Archive (close topic)
command.unarchive.title: Unarchive
command.hide.title: Remove from panel
command.deleteForever.title: Delete permanently…
command.rename.title: Rename label
command.toggleArchived.title: Show/hide archived
command.recapTimeline.title: Recap summary
command.search.title: Search in chats
config.projectsRoot.description: Path to Claude Code project folders. Empty = ~/.claude/projects.
config.newProjectRoot.description: Base folder that pre-fills 'Add project'. Empty = your home folder (~).
config.resumeSkipPermissions.description: Resume with full permissions by default (claude --resume --dangerously-skip-permissions). The viewer's ⚡ button always applies it, regardless of this setting.
config.blockedAfterSeconds.description: Seconds a tool may stay pending before marking the topic as 🔴 blocked (possible permission prompt or hang).
config.idleAfterMinutes.description: Minutes of inactivity after which a topic becomes ⚪ idle (off the radar: no blinking, not counted in the badge).
command.enableLiveSignal.title: Enable live status
command.snooze.title: Snooze…
command.unsnooze.title: Unsnooze
